introSection: Bombora is a steel roller coaster located at Lagoon in Farmington, Utah, USA. It opened to guests on April 2, 2011.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 2 trains with 8 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 16 riders per train.

fullText:
Bombora is a steel roller coaster located at Lagoon in Farmington, Utah, USA. It opened to guests on April 2, 2011.



2 trains with 8 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 16 riders per train.
